end,function(Q)z[Q]=z[Q]-(-50064-(-50065))if z[Q]==863967+-863967 then z[Q],N[Q]=nil,nil end end,{},function(Q,X)local b=c(X)local K=function(K)return y(Q,{K},X,b)end return K end return(i(-649108+14879200,{}))(b(F))end)(getfenv and getfenv()or _ENV,unpack or table[X(668580-626359)],newproxy,setmetatable,getmetatable,select,{...})end)(...)
